title: Jamaican Cheese Crumble
description: A spicy twist on a classic crumble, featuring jamaican seasoning and a crumbly, cheesy topping.

ingredients.name: Crumbly Topping
ingredients.notes: made from gluten-free oats and spices

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together sweet potatoes and jamaican cheese.
In a separate bowl, mix together crumbly topping and melted butter.
Transfer sweet potato mixture to a baking dish and top with crumbly topping.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until topping is golden brown and sweet potatoes are tender.
